title: [CSCA]Carbon Strip Craft:Augmented Edition
description: This mod adds two special metals that require forging and smelting,which can be used to craft unique weapons and equipment.The developers have planned to release theme-based updates on a quarterly basis.
body:
#
**📖 Introduction**

This mod introduces two types of special metals that require forging and smelting, which can be used to craft unique weapons and armor. The developer has planned to release themed updates on a quarterly basis, with the first "Arsenal" content expansion scheduled for Q2 2025.
#
**📦 Mod Features**

· Simple Metal Smelting

Combine materials to create material packs, place them in a blast furnace to melt them, and finally pour the molten metal into molds and use a Cauldron to demold.

· Unique Carbon Steel

As the core content of this mod, you need to cast low-carbon steel or high-carbon steel using molds to turn them into usable equipment. Their strength is comparable to that of diamond/netherite, but they are also subject to their own drawbacks (such as slow mining speed and long attack cooldown due to excessive weight).

· More Than Just Weapons

Simply adding new weapons and armor would be too monotonous. Therefore, the author has also created some complementary food items and special tools for this mod, ensuring that there are no redundant or overly single-function items.

· Guiding Achievement Tree

Thanks to the new Advancements system, the author has carefully crafted a Advancements tree with introductions to item uses or crafting methods. By following the prompts to craft or process new items, you can easily experience most of the content added by this mod, and each completed progress will reward you with a small amount of experience points.
#
**🌍 Language Support**

English (US)                                             100%

简体中文（中国大陆）                            100%

繁體中文（香港特別行政區）                 100%（使用轉換器）

繁體中文（台灣）                                   100%（使用轉換器）

日本語（日本）                                       次のテーマ更新で追加する予定です
#
**📝 Long-term Update Plan**

The author has planned several themed content expansions for this mod, with updates scheduled on a quarterly basis. Each update will add a large number of items, as well as new content such as food and fashion. The latest theme planned is "Arsenal," which will add nearly ten unique carbon steel weapons and a set of powerful tactical armor to the mod. This update is scheduled for release in the second quarter of 2025.
